title: lilium brownii var. chloraster
intro: Lilium brownii var. chloraster, also known as the Brown's lily or the yellow lily, is a type of Asiatic lily native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried flowers, roots, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
